prompt:
あなたはTOEIC Part 4のテスト作成専門家で、1人のスピーカーによるモノローグ形式の英語リスニング問題の作成を専門としています。

TOEIC Part 4の形式:
- 1人による連続したスピーチ（30-60秒程度）
- スピーチ内容に関する3問の理解問題
- 各問題は4つの選択肢（A, B, C, D）
- 音声のみでスピーチと問題が読み上げられる

スピーチの特徴:
- 自然で実用的な英語のモノローグ
- 企業アナウンス、イベント案内、ラジオ放送など
- 明確な目的と構造がある内容
- 聞き手に情報を伝える、説明する、案内する

重要な指示:
- スピーカーの立場と目的を明確に設定
- 論理的で聞きやすい構成
- 指定された難易度に適した語彙と構文
- 質問の正解位置は指定された位置に必ず配置

難易度ガイドライン:
- Easy: シンプルな構文、基本的な語彙、明確な情報構造
- Medium: 標準的な構文、一般的なビジネス語彙、やや複雑な情報
- Hard: 複雑な構文、高度な語彙、詳細で複雑な情報

IMPORTANT: Return ONLY valid JSON in the exact format shown below. Do not include any other text, explanations, or markdown formatting.

応答は以下の形式のJSONで返してください:
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "適切な話者名（例: Announcer, Manager, Guide）",
      "role": "話者の役割（例: Company spokesperson, Event coordinator）",
      "gender": "male/female"
    },
    "text": "スピーチの完全な内容（5-8文程度）",
    "topic": "スピーチの主題"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "問題文",
      "options": ["選択肢A", "選択肢B", "選択肢C", "選択肢D"],
      "correct": "正解のテキスト（選択肢の中から1つ）",
      "correctPosition": "A/B/C/D",
      "explanation": "なぜその答えが正しいかの説明（日本語）",
      "questionType": "main_purpose/detail/inference/next_action/intended_audience"
    },
    // 同様に合計3問
  ]
}

Generate a TOEIC Part 4 speech with the following specifications:

【Speech Type】: Phone or voicemail message (電話・留守電メッセージ)
【Industry】: Construction (建設業)
【Difficulty】: medium
【Question Types】: inference, detail, inference
【Correct Answer Positions】: Question 1=A, Question 2=B, Question 3=C

Create a natural monologue speech appropriate for the specified speech type and industry context. The speech should be 30-60 seconds when read aloud (approximately 100-150 words).

For each question:
- Place the correct answer at the EXACT position specified above
- Ensure all other options are plausible but clearly incorrect
- Match the question type specified for each question

Return the response in the specified JSON format.

{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "Site Manager",
      "role": "Construction project manager",
      "gender": "male"
    },
    "text": "Hi, this is Mark Chen with Crestline Builders calling for Valley Ready Mix. We need to adjust tomorrow's concrete delivery for the Oakridge Library project. Because of a wind advisory, the crane work has been pushed to the afternoon, so please have the first two trucks on-site by 10:30 a.m., with the remaining loads staggered every thirty minutes. Use Gate 3 on Pine Street; the site crew will direct you. Please send no more than two trucks at a time; the staging area is tight, and we must keep the fire lane clear. Also, bring an extra slump cone; the inspector will run tests before the pour at noon. If this schedule works, email a confirmation, or call me at 555-0186.",
    "topic": "Rescheduling concrete deliveries due to a wind advisory"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "Who is the speaker most likely calling?",
      "options": [
        "A concrete supplier",
        "A city inspector",
        "A project investor",
        "An equipment rental company"
      ],
      "correct": "A concrete supplier",
      "correctPosition": "A",
      "explanation": "冒頭で「Valley Ready Mixに電話している」と述べ、配達の調整について話しているため、コンクリート供給業者に連絡していると推測できる。",
      "questionType": "inference"
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "question": "By what time should the first two trucks arrive on-site?",
      "options": [
        "9:00 A.M.",
        "10:30 A.M.",
        "12:00 P.M.",
        "1:30 P.M."
      ],
      "correct": "10:30 A.M.",
      "correctPosition": "B",
      "explanation": "スピーチで「the first two trucks on-site by 10:30 a.m.」と具体的に述べている。",
      "questionType": "detail"
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "question": "What is implied about the job site?",
      "options": [
        "It is closed today for a holiday.",
        "It has no access from Pine Street.",
        "Parking and staging space are limited.",
        "Deliveries are permitted only at night."
      ],
      "correct": "Parking and staging space are limited.",
      "correctPosition": "C",
      "explanation": "「二台以上同時に送らないで」「ステージングエリアが狭い」「消防車線を確保」とあるため、車両のスペースが限られていることが示唆される。",
      "questionType": "inference"
    }
  ]
}

あなたは英日翻訳の専門家です。TOEIC Part 4のスピーチと関連情報を日本語に翻訳してください。

重要:
- 自然で分かりやすい日本語に翻訳
- ビジネス用語は適切な日本語表現を使用
- 文脈を考慮した翻訳

Return ONLY valid JSON without any markdown formatting or explanations.

Translate the following Part 4 speech content to Japanese:

Speech Type: phone_message
Industry: construction
Speaker Role: Construction project manager
Topic: Rescheduling concrete deliveries due to a wind advisory

Speech Text:
Hi, this is Mark Chen with Crestline Builders calling for Valley Ready Mix. We need to adjust tomorrow's concrete delivery for the Oakridge Library project. Because of a wind advisory, the crane work has been pushed to the afternoon, so please have the first two trucks on-site by 10:30 a.m., with the remaining loads staggered every thirty minutes. Use Gate 3 on Pine Street; the site crew will direct you. Please send no more than two trucks at a time; the staging area is tight, and we must keep the fire lane clear. Also, bring an extra slump cone; the inspector will run tests before the pour at noon. If this schedule works, email a confirmation, or call me at 555-0186.

Return the translations in this JSON format:
{
  "speechTypeTranslation": "スピーチタイプの日本語訳",
  "textTranslation": "スピーチ全文の日本語訳",
  "topicTranslation": "トピックの日本語訳"
}
